pages:
The goal of this game is to sting people whenever they do something wrong.
There are two types of character: the plastic waster and the polluter.
The plastic waster tends to buy plastic bottles at the vending machine. Sting him when he has the intention to go buy a plastic bottle.

The second one is the polluter. She uses too much soap that pollutes the soil. You can tell that by the icon on the soap tank she uses. Sting her when her intention icon contains the pollutant (danger diamond-shaped icon). Do not sting her if the icon contains ECO labels such as ICEA, ECO Label and USDA (green icons).

If you sting them at the right time, new flowers will grow and new fish will come to visit the town.
Pollinate flowers (look for the bee icon) to unlock new knowledge about sustainability!
You can also drop rubbish on their head to gain 1 additional fish!
If you do not do anything, the fish will start to disappear.
Once you've unlocked 12 flowers and read 12 facts, the game will end, and the experiment will be concluded.

Use WASD or the arrows to move.
SPACE and CTRL to control your height.
Mouse (Left click) or F to sting.
E to interact with flowers.
C to pick up rubbish and C again to drop it.
